jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Pfizer India
jsonLd.description:
Pfizer India has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Pfizer India:
Pfizer India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pfizer India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
